# Acme Coaching — About Us

Acme Coaching was founded in 2019 by Jane Pritchard, a former product manager at Stripe. The company is headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal, and operates fully remote.

## What we do

Acme Coaching helps mid-career product managers prepare for senior PM and Director-of-Product interviews at FAANG-tier companies. We run a 12-week cohort that costs $4,800 per seat, with payment plans available.

## Format

Each cohort accepts a maximum of 14 participants. Weekly sessions run for 90 minutes on Tuesdays at 18:00 UTC. Office hours are held every Thursday at the same time. All sessions are recorded and made available for 12 months after cohort completion.

## What's included

- 12 live group sessions
- 4 one-on-one mock interviews with practicing FAANG PMs
- A peer-review group of 3 other cohort members
- Lifetime access to the curriculum vault (200+ artifacts)
- A private Slack workspace with 600+ alumni

## Outcomes

In our 2024 cohort, 73% of participants received at least one senior offer within 6 months of completion. Median compensation increase was $48,000 across the same group.

## Refund policy

Full refund available within the first 14 days of the cohort, no questions asked. After day 14, refunds are pro-rated against weeks remaining.

## Contact

Email: hello@acmecoaching.example.com. Founder Jane Pritchard responds personally to all inbound within 48 hours.
